analysis.reasoning: Core message: An optimistic, universal sentiment that humanity will recover stronger after COVID-19, using a proverb about resilience. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): No mention of the West or moral contrasts. CH2 (China as benevolent power): No reference to China’s international role, cooperation, or multilateralism. CH3 (China’s epic history): Although a proverb-like line is used, there is no explicit linkage to China’s historical resilience or CCP; it’s a general global message. CH4 (appropriate political system/values): No discussion of China’s political system or values. CH5 (CCP succeeds): No claim about government performance or achievements. CH6 (China culture/nature/heritage): While the style resembles a proverb, the tweet does not identify it as Chinese culture nor promote cultural content specifically. Conclusion: The tweet promotes no listed narratives.
